headline: Raytheon awarded DARPA contract to advance adaptable rocket motor technology (RTX)
summary: Raytheon, a business unit of RTX (NYSE:RTX), has secured a phase two contract from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) to continue development of composable solid rocket motor technology under the Burn n’ Go program. New propulsion system designed for flexible mission requirementsThe project is focused on developing rocket motors capable of dynamically adjusting thrust during operation to support multiple mission profiles, replacing conventional single-purpose motor designs.

headline: CPI Aerostructures is Awarded Follow-on Contract from Northrop Grumman for Welded Assemblies for E-2D Advanced Hawkeye

headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on Northrop Grumman, Lowers Price Target to $620
summary: Jefferies  analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu   maintains Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $660 to $620.

headline: RTX's Raytheon selected by DARPA to advance composable solid rocket motor technology
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, in collaboration with Northrop Grumman, has been awarded a phase two contract from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) Burn n' Go program to continue the development of a new solid rocket motor (SRM) design. This new capability will decouple post-manufactured motors from traditional, single-use designs, enabling a composable motor capable of meeting multiple mission needs by adjusting thrust on demand.

raw.headline: RTX's Raytheon selected by DARPA to advance composable solid rocket motor technology
raw.summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, in collaboration with Northrop Grumman, has been awarded a phase two contract from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) Burn n' Go program to continue the development of a new solid rocket motor (SRM) design. This new capability will decouple post-manufactured motors from traditional, single-use designs, enabling a composable motor capable of meeting multiple mission needs by adjusting thrust on demand.
